quest.08000D28B577EF94.quest_desc.original: Claiming this quest reward will set a waypoint at the &dEcho's &6Archive&r entrance.
quest.08000D28B577EF94.quest_desc.translation: 領取該任務的任務獎勵會幫你在該&d回聲&r的&6檔案庫&r的入口處設置一個定位點。

quest.0A3C1CD48C85E17D.quest_desc.original:
Within the lower parts of the &7Deepslate&r ring, you have a chance to run into the &dAncient City&r.

Surely there is nothing bad down there. Just quietly sneak in and find a few of &dEcho Shards&r.

You should see the &dEcho of The Enchanter&r after acquiring this shard.

&eNote&r: The &dEnchanter&r mentioned that the &dWayfinder&r can also offer you some that you can buy once you've completed some of their tasks.
quest.0A3C1CD48C85E17D.quest_desc.translation:
你有機會在&7深板岩&r環帶的較低處遇到&d遠古城市&r。

當然，那邊沒有任何的危險。你只要安靜的潛行進入，並找到幾片&d回聲碎片&r就好了。

當取得這片碎片後，回去找&d附魔道長之回聲&r交差。

&e備註&r：&d附魔道長&r提到說：&d尋路先鋒&r會在你完成他的任務之後賣給你一些&d回聲碎片&r。

quest.0B02B72259362345.quest_desc.original: Claiming this quest reward will set a waypoint at the &dEcho's &6Archive&r entrance.
quest.0B02B72259362345.quest_desc.translation: 領取該任務的任務獎勵會幫你在該&d回聲&r的&6檔案庫&r的入口處設置一個定位點。

quest.101B8D9769D835AB.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.101B8D9769D835AB.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.18AF36E1C2375101.quest_desc.original: Using the latent magical powers of &7Deepslate&r, you should be able to craft a bookshelf that can grant even stronger enchants within your table.
quest.18AF36E1C2375101.quest_desc.translation: 利用殘存於&7深板岩&r內的古代魔力，你可以合成出一些能夠為你的附魔台提供更強大附魔的書櫃。

quest.1F66695405A4863D.quest_desc.original:
The &dChroniton Star&r is filled with the power to alter time and space.

Using the &6World Engine&r, you should be able to drain this power to upgrade the &6World Engine&r itself by infusing its own power into &2Chroniton Glass&r.

&eNote&r: The &dChroniton Star&r can be restored once you've upgraded the &6World Engine&r with the glass.
quest.1F66695405A4863D.quest_desc.translation:
&d時空粒子之星&r之中富含著能夠影響時空的能量。

透過&6世界引擎&r，你應當能夠汲取到這種能量，並將它灌注為&2時空粒子玻璃&r：你的下一項&6世界引擎&r升級。

&e備註&r：當你使用該玻璃升級&6世界引擎&r後，你將能夠再次為&d時空粒子之星&r進行充能。

quest.2AB58696A843E9C2.quest_desc.original:
With more &6Archives&r unlocked, it is time to explore the lobby and find the &dEcho of The Fabricator&r.

Work with this &dEcho&r to unlock the &cHeat Upgrade&r for your &6World Engine&r.

&7&oYou may teleport directly to this Echo from anywhere in the lobby after meeting them using &e/echo fabricator&7.
quest.2AB58696A843E9C2.quest_desc.translation:
隨著更多&6檔案庫&r的解鎖，是時候探索大廳並找出&d熱力謙者之回聲&r了。

和這位&d回聲&r協力為你的&6世界引擎&r解鎖&3熱源升級&r吧。

&7&o你可以在初訪這位回聲後，於大廳的任何地方使用下列指令傳送至他身旁：「&e/echo fabricator&7」。

quest.30689B890F5E7A03.quest_desc.original:
The basics of infusing magic into your items starts with an &dEnchanting Table&r.

This table will draw in the latent magical energies of bookshelves around them. Basic bookshelves will only get you so far!

&eNote&r: You'll need either &aInfused Hellshelves&r or &aInfused Seashelves&r to reach the required &bEterna&r levels for progression!
quest.30689B890F5E7A03.quest_desc.translation:
為物品進行魔法灌注的基石就是&d附魔台&r。

它會從附近汲取潛藏於書櫃中的魔法能量。但最基礎的書櫃能做到的事情非常有限！

&e備註&r：你會需要&a地獄灌注書櫃&r或&a海洋灌注書櫃&r其一，才能達到推動進展所需的&b位階&r等級！

quest.370B05FC62884456.quest_desc.original:
The &aSuperheating Element&r is perfect for the core of a heater.

While it may seem like you have 2 options for the type of heater you choose to make, the &cFuelwood Heater&r can only produce heat via coal or wood, rendering it insufficient to heat your &6World Engine&r.

The &cResistive Heater&r, however, specializes in converting power directly into heat. It allows for fine-tuning how much power is converted, and generates significantly more heat.

&eNote&r: 2k FE/t is ideal for hitting around 350°C.
{@pagebreak}
To power the heater, you can either bring some generators or energy cubes down, or use &dSpectre Coils&r for wireless power transfer.

Most crafts will require around &c350°C&r to work, and you will need to maintain that temperature during the craft for it to complete.
quest.370B05FC62884456.quest_desc.translation:
&a導熱元件&r是一台加熱器的完美核心。

縱使你似乎可以選擇做出兩種不同的加熱器之一，&c木料加熱器&r只能透過煤炭或木頭等燃料產生熱量，這對於加熱你的&6世界引擎&r來說是非常沒效率的。

&c電阻加熱器&r則能夠直接將能量轉換為熱量。它能夠設定該轉換多少能量，並能夠顯著產出更多熱量。

&e備註&r：為了達到 350°C，將用電量設置為 2k FE/t 是最理想的選擇。

quest.3E1DB27DAB197F6B.quest_desc.original:
With more &6Archives&r unlocked, it is time to explore the lobby and find the &dEcho of The Wayfinder&r.

Help this &dEcho&r to unlock the &aChroniton Glass&r upgrade for your &bWorld Engine&r.

&7&oYou may teleport directly to this Echo from anywhere in the lobby after meeting them using &e/echo wayfinder&7.
quest.3E1DB27DAB197F6B.quest_desc.translation:
隨著更多&6檔案庫&r的解鎖，是時候探索大廳並找出&d尋路先鋒之回聲&r了。

和這位&d回聲&r協力為你的&6世界引擎&r解鎖&3時空粒子玻璃升級&r吧。

&7&o你可以在初訪這位回聲後，於大廳的任何地方使用下列指令傳送至他身旁：「&e/echo wayfinder&7」。

quest.3FA9D6A475E4D1C6.quest_desc.original:
The &dWayfinder&r knows everything there is to know about traversing this world.

He mentioned a secret power hidden within a &3Vault&r encased in the &3Deepslate&r ring.

&eNote&r: It might be worth making an &aExplorer's Compass&r to help locate the &3Vault&r!

If you manage to find your way through this &3Vault's&r puzzles, the &dChroniton Star&r should be yours for the taking.
quest.3FA9D6A475E4D1C6.quest_desc.translation:
&d尋路先鋒&r深諳遊歷這個世界的一切之道。

他提到了一座藏於&3深板岩&r環帶中的&3寶庫&r中有著一種秘密能源。

&e備註&r：製造一個&a探索者羅盤&r有助於定位該&3寶庫&r！

如果你順利完成了&3寶庫&r中的謎題，&d時空粒子之星&r將會是你的囊中之物。

quest.456904808D93A9E3.quest_desc.original:
This compass points to the location of a &3Vault.

&7&oThe Compass can be Sneak + Right-clicked when within 256 blocks from the vault to instantly teleport to the entrance!&r
quest.456904808D93A9E3.quest_desc.translation:
這個羅盤指向一座&3寶庫&r的確切地點。

&7&o在寶庫的 256 格內手持羅盤「潛行 + 右鍵」\n可以快速傳送至寶庫入口！&r

quest.456B067C9CC123AD.quest_desc.original: Once you've crafted a &cHeater&r, you should return to the &dFabricator&r to learn how to use it with the &6World Engine&r.
quest.456B067C9CC123AD.quest_desc.translation: 當你合成出&d加熱器&r後，你是時候該回訪&d熱力謙者&r，並向他學習該如何在&6世界引擎&r上使用它了。

quest.4A87B0D25DE57F3F.quest_desc.original:
Before you can complete the &dEnchanter's&r first task, you'll need to find a tougher version of stone.

Dig out further into the world until you find some &7Deepslate&r.

While it might not look magical, the remnants of ancient magic can be tapped into for their enchanting powers.
quest.4A87B0D25DE57F3F.quest_desc.translation:
在你足以完成&d附魔道長&r的第一項任務之前，你會需要找到一種更堅硬的石頭。

挖穿這個世界，直到你找到一些&7深板岩&r。

縱使它看起來不太「魔法」，殘存於其內的古代魔力能夠發揮其附魔之力。

quest.4BFF8EE3F588E006.quest_desc.original:
With more &6Archives&r unlocked, it is time to explore the lobby and find the &dEcho of The Enchanter&r.

Work with this &dEcho&r to unlock the &3Enchanting Upgrade&r for your &6World Engine&r.

&7&oYou may teleport directly to this Echo from anywhere in the lobby after meeting them using &e/echo enchanter&7.
quest.4BFF8EE3F588E006.quest_desc.translation:
隨著更多&6檔案庫&r的解鎖，是時候探索大廳並找出&d附魔道長之回聲&r了。

和這位&d回聲&r協力為你的&6世界引擎&r解鎖&3附魔升級&r吧。

&7&o你可以在初訪這位回聲後，於大廳的任何地方使用下列指令傳送至他身旁：「&e/echo enchanter&7」。

quest.4D754E91D203A89A.quest_desc.original:
Now that you've unlocked a few &6World Engine&r upgrades, you should head back to the &dEcho of Guidance&r.

Make sure you've claimed any outstanding rewards from the other &dEchoes&r.
quest.4D754E91D203A89A.quest_desc.translation:
現在，你已經解鎖了一些&6世界引擎&r升級了，是時候返回&d指引嚮導之回聲&r處了。

請確保你已經向其他&d回聲&r領取所有未發放的獎勵了。

quest.50B0E45705EDB5F2.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.50B0E45705EDB5F2.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.50B7A38F7E66139C.quest_desc.original:
Heat is easy to generate, but very easy to lose when transferring between machines.

To reduce the loss of heat, there are special cables for this specific use.

Craft a few of the &dUltimate Thermodynamic Conductors&r. These should do the trick.
quest.50B7A38F7E66139C.quest_desc.translation:
熱量很容易產生，但非常容易在傳輸於機器間時逸散。

這裡有種特別的線纜能夠滿足我們的需求：它能夠巨幅減少熱量的逸散。

合成一些&d終極導熱線纜&r。它們很棒。

quest.66E73F99D943365C.quest_desc.original:
The first task from the &dFabricator&r is to create an element that can withstand very high temperatures.

The &6World Engine&r should be able to forge these elements, as long as you have the &3Machine Block Upgrade&r.
quest.66E73F99D943365C.quest_desc.translation:
來自&d熱力謙者&r的第一個任務是製造一個可以承受極度高溫的元件。

如果&6世界引擎&r擁有&3機器方塊升級&r的話，你應當能夠鍛造出這項元件。

quest.66FF7D88B712C969.quest_desc.original: Claiming this quest reward will set a waypoint at the &dEcho's &6Archive&r entrance.
quest.66FF7D88B712C969.quest_desc.translation: 領取該任務的任務獎勵會幫你在該&d回聲&r的&6檔案庫&r的入口處設置一個定位點。

quest.6E149F8E8B3F150B.quest_desc.original: Once you've crafted the &2Echoing Deepshelves&r, head back to the &dEcho of the Enchanter&r to learn how to install it into the &6World Engine&r as an upgrade.
quest.6E149F8E8B3F150B.quest_desc.translation: 當你合成出了足夠多的&2回聲深板岩書櫃&r後，你是時候該回訪&d附魔道長&r，並向他學習該如何在&6世界引擎&r安裝這項升級了。

quest.7191726ECAAFE40F.quest_desc.original: Once you've crafted enough &2Chroniton Glass&r, head back to the &dEcho of the Wayfinder&r to learn how to install it into the &6World Engine&r as an upgrade.
quest.7191726ECAAFE40F.quest_desc.translation: 當你合成出了足夠多的&2時空粒子玻璃&r後，你是時候該回訪&d尋路先鋒&r，並向他學習該如何在&6世界引擎&r安裝這項升級了。

task.7ECEEC776BBA8B53.title.translation: 與&d指引嚮導之回聲&r交談
